instrumentation.fullDescription: Cikakken kewayon kayan aikin daidaito don aikace-aikacen sa ido da sarrafa masana'antu.

electrical.fullDescription: Cikakken kewayon kayan aikin lantarki ciki har da sauyawa, relays, contactors, da kayan aikin rarraba wutar lantarki don aikace-aikacen masana'antu.

specifications.voltageRange: Yanayin ƙarfin lantarki: 24V DC zuwa 690V AC

measurement.fullDescription: Mita na dijital masu ci gaba, masu nazari, da kayan aikin daidaitawa don daidaitaccen aunawa da sa ido kan sigogin lantarki da tsari.

solar.fullDescription: Cikakkun hanyoyin samar da makamashin hasken rana ciki har da panels, inverters, tsarin sa ido, da kayan aikin ɗaure-grid don samar da makamashi mai dorewa.

specifications.powerRange: Ƙarfin wutar lantarki: 300W zuwa 500W a kowane panel

automation.fullDescription: Ci gaba da sarrafa kansa da tsarin sarrafawa ciki har da PLCs, HMIs, hanyoyin SCADA, da na'urorin sadarwa na masana'antu.

safety.fullDescription: Kayan aiki na tsaro da kariya ciki har da masu karya kewayawa, relays na tsaro, tsarin tsayar da gaggawa, da na'urorin kariya.

pumps.fullDescription: Famfunan injiniya masu inganci, kayan gyara, da kayan aikin kulawa don aikace-aikace daban-daban na masana'antu da kasuwanci.

specifications.flowRate: Yawan gudun ruwa: 10 LPM zuwa 5000 LPM
specifications.head: Kai: 10m zuwa 500m

tools.fullDescription: Kayan aikin masana'antu masu ƙima, tackles, da kayan aikin kulawa don aikace-aikacen injiniya da kulawa daban-daban.

specifications.certifiedStandards: An tabbatar da shi zuwa ƙa'idodin duniya

rccb-circuit-breakers.title: Masu Karya Kewayawa na RCCB
rccb-circuit-breakers.description: Masu Karya Kewayawa na Yanzu-Yanzu (RCCB) don kariyar ɗigar ƙasa. Muhimman na'urorin tsaro waɗanda ke karewa daga girgizar lantarki da haɗarin gobara ta hanyar gano rashin daidaiton wutar lantarki.

acb-circuit-breakers.title: Masu Karya Kewayawa na ACB
acb-circuit-breakers.description: Masu Karya Kewayawa na Iska (ACB) don rarraba wutar lantarki mai ƙarancin ƙarfi. Masu karya kewayawa masu girma tare da fasalolin kariya masu ci gaba don tsarin lantarki na masana'antu da kasuwanci.

vcb-circuit-breakers.title: Masu Karya Kewayawa na VCB
vcb-circuit-breakers.description: Masu Karya Kewayawa na Vacuum (VCB) don aikace-aikacen matsakaicin ƙarfin lantarki. Babban fasahar kashe baka yana ba da amintaccen sauyawa da kariya a cikin tashoshin lantarki.

specs.ratedCurrent: Ƙarfin Wutar Lantarki da Aka Ƙima
